raw_text: There has been a major road accident near Anna Flyover on NH48. Multiple vehicles involved, at least two people are injured and blocking traffic.
Accident on Anna Flyover NH48. Cars piled up. Ambulance needed urgently.
I am calling from Anna Flyover. There is a big crash, a truck hit two cars. People are trapped inside one of the cars.
Image caption: Overturned truck on NH48 near Anna Flyover, debris scattered across both lanes, bystanders gathered.
Multi-vehicle collision at Anna Flyover NH48. Road completely blocked. Police and fire brigade required.
Hello, I am near Anna Flyover on the highway. A lorry has overturned and hit two cars. One person is unconscious. Please send help fast.
Crash at Anna Flyover NH48. Truck overturned. 3 injured. Traffic jam stretching 2 km.
Image caption: Emergency responders at scene of truck-car collision on NH48 Anna Flyover, injured person on stretcher.
Accident near Anna Flyover. Truck and two cars collided. One car is on fire. Please send fire engine and ambulance immediately.
NH48 Anna Flyover accident. Truck on fire after collision. Urgent help needed. Multiple casualties reported.
